title: ctenitis recedens
intro: Ctenitis recedens, also known as the mountain fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis recedens include the treatment of fever, respiratory issues, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a natural antiseptic and antibacterial agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
